name: Exact-Logo Brand-Kit Workflow
description: Reusable workflow for creating client brand-kit mockups with exact logo preservation. Prevents logo hallucination by using deterministic asset placement instead of relying on image generation alone. Includes preprocessing, compositing, and explicit fidelity QA.
trigger_conditions: Client brand kits or logo boards requested
Mockups, pitch decks, or presentation assets need exact logo placement
Xpose assets or sales collateral require brand identity fidelity
User says 'use this exact logo,' 'the real logo,' or 'our actual brand mark'
Black/transparent logos or logos with unusual backgrounds involved
Generated brand boards need logo verification before delivery
Previous logo hallucination or recreation instead of using actual file
key_features: Logo asset preprocessing for black-on-transparent visibility
Deterministic compositing workflow instead of probabilistic generation
Explicit visual comparison and fidelity QA
Frederick Roof Repair case study with failure-to-success path
hard_rules: Never claim exact logo preservation from generate_image.reference_images alone
Image generation is probabilistic, not pixel-perfect preservation
Always use deterministic asset placement for exact logos
Preprocess black-on-transparent logos with visible backgrounds
Perform visual comparison before reporting logo fidelity
step_summary: 1. Locate and download the real logo asset
2. Inspect logo assets for alpha, bounds, contrast, visibility risks
3. Create visible flattened preview for black-on-transparent logos
4. Generate layout/mockup with reserved logo zones
5. Place and composite exact logo asset onto board/mockups
6. Visually compare against source and check for hallucination risks
7. Record output paths and source logo path
anti_patterns: Claim exact logo use from generate_image.reference_images alone
Send black-on-transparent logos directly to image models without preprocessing
Trust analyzer output on low-contrast logos without visual inspection
Describe logos not actually visible in output
Reroll image generation repeatedly hoping it includes the logo
Say 'exact' or 'verified' without doing visual comparison
author: Prometheus
